channel.title: Water Systems on Koios.News
channel.description: Recent content in Water Systems on Koios.News

item.title: Canada Tar Sands Shutdown Marks Turning Point in Resource Collapse
item.description: Canada’s Horizon tar sands project shut down today—not because of policy or protest, but because the Athabasca River can no longer support it. This marks a new phase in collapse: the land itself is setting limits. The Canada tar sands shutdown shows extractive industry is now failing on ecological, not economic, terms.

item.title: Peru's Water Emergency Reveals a Systemic Collapse from Summit to Soil
item.description: Peru’s water emergency reveals the collapse of a thousand-year system. Glaciers once fed rivers, fields, and cities. Now, water arrives unpredictably—if at all. This is not drought. It is systemic collapse, where mountain life unravels and the vertical logic of Andean civilization fails from summit to soil.
